summary: Phase 2 Renter Booking Flow - All 5 features verified working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: Complete booking flow tested with Playwright - form submission, price breakdown, checkout redirect all working.

issues: Shows 'Бронирование недоступно' (Booking unavailable) briefly before loading - minor UX issue but booking still works

critical_code_review_comments: Commission calculation working correctly - uses partner's custom_commission_rate (5% for test partner)
Price breakdown shows rental cost + 15% service fee correctly
Telegram notifications with Approve/Decline buttons are implemented in NotificationService.sendTelegramBookingRequest
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings during testing: b-87e0a7df, b-0ab48263 (via Playwright)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Renter Booking Flow is complete and working. All booking features verified: availability check returns blocked dates, booking creation with commission, PENDING status, price breakdown with service fee. Telegram notification with inline buttons (Approve/Decline) is implemented but not tested (requires Telegram bot interaction).

1_availability_api.test: Returns blocked dates array, handles date validation
1_availability_api.result: API returns blockedDates array from calendar_blocks and existing bookings

2_booking_creation_api.test: Create booking with guestName, guestEmail, specialRequests, dates
2_booking_creation_api.result: Booking created successfully with all fields persisted in DB

3_booking_status_pending.test: Verify booking status is PENDING after creation
3_booking_status_pending.result: All created bookings have status='PENDING' in database

4_commission_calculation.result: Commission calculated using partner's custom_commission_rate (5%), saved correctly in DB

5_frontend_booking_flow.test: Open listing page, select dates, see price breakdown, submit request
5_frontend_booking_flow.result: Full flow works: modal opens, dates selected, price breakdown shows (rental + 15% service fee), form submits, redirects to checkout page

frontend_test_results.booking_modal: PASS - Opens on Book Now click
frontend_test_results.form_fields: PASS - All fields fillable (name, email, phone, dates)
frontend_test_results.price_breakdown: PASS - Shows rental cost, service fee (15%), and total
frontend_test_results.booking_created: PASS - Booking ID b-0ab48263 created with PENDING status
